creatives.niche_raw: retro game console modders, Game Boy enthusiasts, clear/transparent shell collectors, DIY hardware upgraders
creatives.angle_raw: upgrade your Game Boy with modern displays and compatible shells — make your retro hardware look exactly how you want it

mechanism: modern look with this new FunnyPlaying display

notes: Retro Modding (BitBoy) sells Game Boy replacement shells, IPS display kits, and mod parts. Clear/transparent shells are a key product category (verified via Finder research; specific transparent-shell product text not captured in this homepage fetch). The market signal: sustained commercial demand for see-through retro handheld shells exists. Positioned in the retro-modding niche, not maker/open-source.
